ham.subject: Upcoming Corporate VPN Maintenance - Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

As part of our ongoing commitment to secure connectivity, the corporate VPN service will undergo routine maintenance on Friday, 15 April 2026 from 01:00 AM to 04:00 AM GMT. During this time, VPN access will be unavailable.

Please plan your work accordingly and log out before the maintenance window. If you encounter issues after the maintenance, contact IT Support at <URL> or email it_support@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Important: Immediate Action Required – Income Tax Refund Notice
spam.body:
Dear [First Name],

We are pleased to inform you that the Income Tax Department has processed your refund for the fiscal year 2023. An additional amount of $12,000 has been credited to your account.

To claim your refund, please confirm your banking details by clicking the link below.
<URL>

Failure to verify within 48 hours may result in a delay.

If you have any questions, contact the tax department at 1-800-555-1234.

Thank you.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
